title: cyperus flavescens f. fontanesii
intro: Cyperus flavescens f. fontanesii, also known as Yellow Papyrus Sedge, is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant has been used to alleviate symptoms of coughs, colds, and fever, as well as to reduce inflammation and promote healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and salves, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
